title: Software Update - DFU  - Onboarding in not displayed over DFU screens after connecting new device
scenario: Onboarding dialog is not displayed over DFU screens after connecting a new device that supports onboarding; it only appears on the Home screen after DFU finishes and the user closes the DFU screen.
steps: Connect a new device that supports onboarding (e.g., Emu, Tern, Osprey) while DFU is running.
Observe the app screen during the DFU process.
Check the Home screen for the onboarding dialog.
expected: The onboarding dialog should appear on the Home screen after the user closes the DFU screen.
